title: This Is Bad... They Just Shut Down FABLE 5
summary: Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models were shut down after three days following a US government order restricting public access to frontier AI systems. The video argues this raises critical questions about whether powerful AI models will remain accessible to the general public or become restricted to government control.
writeup: The video reports that Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models were shut down three days after release following a US government order restricting public access to frontier AI systems. It frames the central question of whether powerful models will stay available to the general public or shift toward government-controlled access. The stakes tie directly to AI safety, regulation, and access control over frontier systems.
